en: South Korea Industrial Accident Compensation Insurance
Is your company required to pay contributions on behalf of your employees to the Korea Workers' Compensation & Welfare Service (KCOMWEL)?
The company does not have any employees
The company is foreign and does not have an entity in South Korea

Companies can request an official certificate of their Industrial Accident Insurance registration through [KCOMWEL](https://www.kcomwel.or.kr/) or the [South Korea Government24 portal.](https://www.gov.kr/portal/service/serviceInfo/B49000100049)
Does your company have a certificate of evidence of Industrial Accident Compensation Insurance (산재보험 가입 증명원) under the Korea Workers' Compensation & Welfare Service (KCOMWEL)?
The company does not have any employees

National Industrial Accident Insurance/Workers' Compensation/Certificate must be issued by Korea Workers' Compensation & Welfare Service (COMWEL), not by a private company.

There must be a red stamp next to the government body's name, Korea Workers' Compensation & Welfare Service.
